task.summary: Create View -> KDB+ Studio Toolbar and make it auto-selected at installation
Width of the row number column should auto adjust for the largest number
Move 4 icons from the KDB Studio window to the toolbar
Sending a request to a busy q server blocks the GUI in 1.0.3
Update readme. Use background task in Connections Management window.
Fixed issue with writer limited exception
Add license file. Handle all possible issues with grid query unblocking

MESSAGE.value: Create View -> KDB+ Studio Toolbar and make it auto-selected at installation
Width of the row number column should auto adjust for the largest number
Move 4 icons from the KDB Studio window to the toolbar
Sending a request to a busy q server blocks the GUI in 1.0.3
Update readme. Use background task in Connections Management window.
Fixed issue with writer limited exception
Add license file. Handle all possible issues with grid query unblocking

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Add license file. Handle all possible issues with grid query unblocking
